zh.Warwick, Kent, Colony of Rhode Island, B: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德肯特沃里克
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Periam於1535年出生在英國戴文艾可謝特時，她的父親John William Periam25歲，母親Margaret Elizabeth Hone23歲。她和Richard Swett至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1597年8月9日在英國戴文布勞頓享年62歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德肯特沃里克。

zh-hans.Warwick, Kent, Colony of Rhode Island, B: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德肯特沃里克
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Periam于1535年出生在英国戴文艾可謝特时，她的父亲John William Periam25岁，母亲Margaret Elizabeth Hone23岁。她和Richard Swett至少有5个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1597年8月9日在英国戴文布勞頓享年62岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德肯特沃里克。

variants.name: Parham
meanings: English (southern): habitational name from any of the places in Suffolk and Sussex, named in Old English with pere ‘pear’ + hām ‘homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’. Compare Parm .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Periam was born in 1535, in Exeter, Devon, England, her father, John William Periam, was 25 and her mother, Margaret Elizabeth Hone, was 23. She had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Richard Swett. She died on 9 August 1597, in Braunton, Devon, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Warwick, Kent, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

fr.Warwick, Kent, Colony of Rhode Island, B: Warwick, Kent, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Periam est née en 1535, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John William Periam, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Elizabeth Hone, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec Richard Swett. Elle est décédée le 9 août 1597, à Braunton, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Warwick, Kent, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Periam 1535 in Exeter, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John William Periam 25 und ihre Mutter Margaret Elizabeth Hone 23. Sie hatte mit Richard Swett mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. August 1597 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Braunton, Devon, England und wurde in Warwick, Kent, Rhode Island, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Periam è nata il nel 1535 nel Exeter, Devon, England, sua padre, John William Periam, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Margaret Elizabeth Hone, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con Richard Swett. Morì il 9 agosto 1597, nel Braunton, Devon, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Warwick, Kent, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Periamが1535年にイギリスデボンエクセターで生まれた時，父John William Periamは25歳，母Margaret Elizabeth Honeは23歳であった。彼女はRichard Swettとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1597年8月9日にイギリスデボンブラウントンで62歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドケントワーウィックにて埋葬された。

ko.Warwick, Kent, Colony of Rhode Island, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 켄트 워윅
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Periam(이)가 1535년 영국 데폰 세터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John William Periam(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Elizabeth Hone(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Richard Swett(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1597년 8월 9일 영국 데폰 브라운턴에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 켄트 워윅에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Periam nasceu em 1535, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John William Periam, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Elizabeth Hone, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas com Richard Swett. Ela faleceu em 9 de agosto de 1597, em Braunton, Devon, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Warwick, Kent, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ru.Warwick, Kent, Colony of Rhode Island, B: варвикк, кэнт, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Periam родилась в 1535 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени John William Periam было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Elizabeth Hone, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Richard Swett. Она умерла 9 августа 1597 г. в местности браунтон, девон, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности варвикк, кэнт, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика.
